LanguageData.HorsePenis.label: equine penis
LanguageData.HorsePenis.description: A large horse penis. Flares out during sex.
LanguageData.HorseVagina.label: equine vagina
LanguageData.CatPenis.label: feline penis
LanguageData.CatVagina.label: feline vagina
LanguageData.DogPenis.label: canine penis
LanguageData.DogPenis.description: A bright red dog penis. The knot will expand during sex, locking its lover to their partner for a long time.
LanguageData.DogVagina.label: canine vagina
LanguageData.DragonPenis.label: dragon penis
LanguageData.DragonPenis.description: A dragon penis. Has a knot that expands similarly to a dog's penis, but the ribbing on both sides takes its lover to greater heights of pleasure.
LanguageData.DragonVagina.label: dragon vagina
LanguageData.DragonVagina.description: A dragon vagina. Has a similar texture to their outer hide.
LanguageData.RaccoonPenis.label: procyonine penis
LanguageData.HemiPenis.label: hemipenis
LanguageData.HemiPenis.description: Twice the members for double the fun.
LanguageData.CrocodilianPenis.label: crocodilian penis
LanguageData.CrocodilianPenis.description: A crocodilian penis. Large and permenantly erect.
LanguageData.UdderBreasts.label: udders
LanguageData.UdderBreasts.description: An animalistic breast with four nipples.
LanguageData.NarrowVagina.label: narrow vagina
LanguageData.NeedlePenis.label: needle penis
